notes: All three EN category pages (American_films, British_films, Japanese_films) are 'fully diffused' container categories — they hold only subcategories (by year, genre, etc.) and few or no direct member pages. rows=1 for American_films (exactly 1 direct page member 'An Autumn Summer'); rows=0 for British_films and Japanese_films (zero direct members). The selector #mw-pages li a is structurally present and functional, but these top-level container categories carry no flat member list. The class signal ns-14 in bodyClass reliably identifies any category page; ns-0 identifies article pages.
